title: carya ovalis var. borealis
intro: Carya ovalis var. borealis, also known as northern bitternut, is a variety of the bitternut hickory tree that is native to northeastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carya ovalis var. borealis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
